message:
feat(gateway,web): Add real-time notification delivery via WebSocket hub

This commit integrates the notification system with the WebSocket hub,
enabling instant notification delivery to connected clients without
polling. Also tightens security on system-level WebSocket channels.

Backend Changes:

WebSocket Messages (ws/messages.ts):
- Add "notification.created" message type to the MessageType union
- This type is published when a new notification is created

WebSocket Authorization (ws/authorization.ts):
- BREAKING: System channels now require admin access
- Previously system:health, system:metrics, system:dcg, system:alerts,
  system:supervisor, system:jobs, system:context only required auth
- Now returns "Admin access required" error for non-admin users
- This prevents unauthorized access to sensitive operational data

Notification Service (notification.service.ts):
- Add serializeNotification() helper to convert Date objects to ISO
  strings for JSON transport
- Add publishNotificationEvent() to publish to WebSocket hub:
  - Uses channel type "user:notifications" with userId
  - Publishes "notification.created" message type
  - Includes full serialized notification payload
- Call publishNotificationEvent() after notification creation in
  createNotification()

Frontend Changes:

useNotifications Hook (useNotifications.ts):
- Fix channel subscription format: "user:notifications:${recipientId}"
  (was incorrectly "notifications:${recipientId}")
- Update message handling to match hub message envelope format:
  - Check for message.type === "message" with message.message payload
  - Extract hubMessage and check for "notification.created" type
  - Parse notification from hubMessage.payload
- Add acknowledgment support:
  - Check message.ackRequired flag
  - Send ack with messageIds array for messages requiring confirmation
  - Ensures reliable delivery tracking for critical notifications

This enables the notification bell and panel components to update in
real-time without polling, significantly improving UX for time-sensitive
alerts like budget warnings, agent errors, and coordination messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,6 +49,8 @@ export type MessageType =
   | "checkpoint.imported"
   // Agent mail
   | "mail.received"
+  // Notifications
+  | "notification.created"
   // Handoffs
   | "handoff.initiated"
   | "handoff.phase_changed"
